_instructions: Map CNC program O-numbers to ProShop part numbers for legacy lathe programs.
These are programs that live on the machine (T2 - YCM NTC1600LY) and predate
the TraxisPostProcessor header system. Fill in one entry per program.
POPULATED 2026-05-04 from NC code uploads (TEMP UPLOADS/) — part_number and
description filled in from program headers. Folder context (R2-*, AI-*, AP-*,
MONOGRAM-*) names the customer/part for sub-programs.
Entries still showing 'FOCAS bootstrap:' had no NC code uploaded — these may
be programs that were renamed/removed since the FOCAS history captured them.
To find O-numbers: MDI > PROG > DIR on the YCM, or check FOCAS program_directory.
To find part numbers: match the program to the part it cuts in ProShop.
o_number    - Program number on the CNC (e.g. 'O0001'). Include leading zeros.
description - Short note so anyone can identify this (e.g. 'Housing 1st op').
op_number   - ProShop operation number if known (e.g. 60). Optional.
Programs with empty part_number are still tracked but won't auto-cross-reference.

programs.description: 10-01680 SIDE 1. TPM-posted 2026-02-17. Tools: T03 general turning, T05 groove, T07 general turning, T08 drill, T11 spot drill.
10-2004 SIDE 1. TPM-posted 2026-02-26. Note in header: 'TO RUN 5 PARTS USE PROGRAM O7004' (master loop). Tools: T01/T07 general turning, T03 groove, T06 flat end mill, T10 boring, T11 spot drill.
10-2004 SIDE 2. TPM-posted 2026-02-26. Tools: T03/T07 general turning, T06 right hand tap, T08 drill, T11 spot drill.

10878P2 SIDE 1 V2. Posted 2025-06-27 (legacy Mastercam header, not TPM). Tools: T01 OD rough, T07 OD finish, T03 OD groove, T08 drill .532, T06 3/8 SQ EM, T10 ID groove, T11 ID thread, T05 bar puller. Notes: added bar puller op, more chamfer at mouth, revised T6 entry, revised bore finishing T10.
10036 REV B YCM LATHE (R2Sonic, folder R2-10036-10037). Revised tool numbers. Tool T07 OD finish 35-deg (insert VNMG-430.5, library TO310).
10981 SIDE 2. TPM-posted 2026-02-11. Tools: T07 general turning, T08 drill, T10 groove, T11 center drill.

[CANDIDATE — VERIFY] 10042 OP70 most likely (folder R2-10042-10164; 10164's OP70 is in O1647, leaving OP70 of 10042 unaccounted for). Header has only operator notes ('CHANGE PART', 'SWITCH TO HANDLE', 'TO USE TAILSTOCK BUTTONS') — no machine-readable part/op tag. Tool T01 OD 55-deg right (DNMP 150408).

Op 80 of parts 10042 AND 10164 (dual-use shared program). 'OP 80 MILL-TURN' with improved threading. Tool T01 OD 55-deg right (DNMG-432). Folder R2-10042-10164.

10981 SIDE 1. TPM-posted 2026-02-07. Tools: T02 spot drill, T03 groove, T04 drill, T07 general turning, T08 drill, T11 spot drill.
Op 56 of part 10042. Faces and center drills both sides.

10983 SIDE 2. TPM-posted 2026-02-07. Single tool: T07 general turning.
Master program for subprogram O2004 — runs 5 parts of 10-2004 SIDE 1 in a loop (M98P2004L5). Stock stick out 2 inches from collet face.

M CODES YCM NTC 2000SLY — reference list of M-codes (utility/documentation, not a cutting program).
ID OD CHUCKING — chuck setup utility for YCM NTC2000SLY. Inside-clamp / outside-clamp test sequence. Not a cutting program.
PART COUNTER LOOP — generic counter macro. Variables #101=target count, #102=reset flag. Calls subprogram M98P3125 each cycle. Utility, not a cutting program.
Tap macro (G1102 cycle) — utility, not a cutting program.
AIROTOR — American Innovations 121158-001 lathe program (AI-121158-001). Posted 2024-03-05. Inactive customer per Mastercam path. Tools: T07 OD finish 35-deg, plus OD rough.

3000038 MOD — Monogram part 3000038 (folder MONOGRAM-3000038). Posted 2023-10-06. Inactive customer. Tool T03 OD cutoff.

10739A M8 STANDOFF 91MM LONG (R2Sonic, folder R2-10739). Posted 2023-11-14. Tool T01 OD rough 80-deg.

OP 80 MILL-TURN with improved threading. Shared between R2S1-10042 and R2S1-10164 (same dual-use pattern as O4280). Folder R2-10042-10164. Uses T09 (alt of O4280's T01).

Master program for subprogram O3213 — calls multiple times with Z offsets (G52Z0.00, G52Z-0.55, etc.). Folder R2-10036-10037. Assigned to 10036 by elimination (O7002 is already the 10037 master).

NP000688_1_CAD. Posted 2024-01-15 on YCM_NTC1600LY. Tools: T01 CNMG-432 OD rough 80-deg, T03 VPGR 331 OD finish 35-deg, T05 TDXU2E Ingersoll OD groove 2mm, T11 drill 1.063 dia, T08 80-deg ID finish, T02 1/8 SQ EM.
IMPELLER_ARBOR — generic impeller arbor program. Posted 2024-01-02 on YCM_NTC1600LY. Tools: T01 OD rough, T08 .25 center drill, T03 OD finish 35-deg, T05 OD groove narrow, T09 OD thread right.
IMPELLER TRIM — generic impeller trim program (OD 7.05 to 5.2, comment 'CHANGE DEPENDING ON PRODUCT'). Single tool T01 OD rough 80-deg. Pairs with subprogram O1002.
IMPELLER TRIM SUB — subprogram for O1001. Generic step/feed pattern with adjustable processing distance.
